## What & why
<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue (#123). -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New or updated template (`Templates/`)
- [ ] Folder taxonomy change (`structure/`)
- [ ] Documentation (README, plugins, security, contributing)
- [ ] Repo tooling / CI / config
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist
- [ ] No personal or business content (diary, contacts, financials, real client data).
- [ ] No secrets — placeholders only (`<USERNAME>`, `<VPS_IP>`, `<SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF>`, …).
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits, in English.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing.
- [ ] Templates still work with the plugins listed in `REQUIRED-PLUGINS.md`.
